description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a robust, angular body and a prominent drum magazine mounted beneath the receiver. The stock is adjustable and ergonomic, with a textured grip and a cheek rest for improved handling. The handguard is sleek and streamlined, with integrated rails for accessory mounting, and the barrel is medium-length with a visible muzzle device. The rifle is finished in a combination of dark gray, black, and orange accents, giving it a high-tech, urban appearance. The sighting system appears to be a low-profile iron sight, and the overall construction suggests a mix of metal and polymer materials. The magazine and foregrip are oversized, indicating a high-capacity, rapid-fire capability suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern tactical rifle with a drum magazine, adjustable stock, and dark gray, black, and orange accents, designed for high-capacity urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the muzzle, dual barrel openings, and the wide drum magazine beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the rifle, the drum magazine, adjustable stock, and orange-accented foregrip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the adjustable stock, pistol grip, and the back of the drum magazine.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same features as view 1, with clear visibility of the handguard and magazine details.
